title: Indexes, Query Plans, Operator Costs, and Responsible Tuning · Relational Recall
summary: A growing ticket dataset makes queue and analytics queries slow, but each new index adds write and storage cost. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an evidence-backed query performance dossier after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain B-tree and hash-style index strengths, ordering, lookup, storage, and update tradeoffs.
Order composite keys from predicates and sorting needs and identify prefix and covering behavior.
Estimate selectivity and compare scans, seeks, lookups, and join access paths from data distribution.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

SELECT sqlite_version() AS browser_sqlite_version;

steps.title: Index Structures · changed case · Review Index Structures
steps.instruction:
review case — Queue queries filter status and severity, order by opened_at, and join owner_id across 6000 modeled rows. Compare baseline and indexed plans, preserve results, and account for insert and storage cost.

Which action demonstrates Index Structures without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Index Structures · changed case · Review Index Structures.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for explain b-tree and hash-style index strengths, ordering, lookup, storage, and update tradeoffs. For Index Structures · changed case · Review Index Structures, keep Index Structures connected to executable relational evidence.

stimulus.title: Performance Experiment case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Queue queries filter status and severity, order by opened_at, and join owner_id across 2000 modeled rows. Compare baseline and indexed plans, preserve results, and account for insert and storage cost.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: One faster timing on a tiny fixture proves an optimization.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Benchmark representative warmed and cold cases, verify unchanged results, and account for write amplification. Artifact under review: an evidence-backed query performance dossier.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.
Run a convenient Performance Experiment query for separate evidence from confidence, omit grain, NULL, cardinality, and dialect checks, then accept one plausible result grid.
The record names the assumption, applies Performance Experiment, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort · Review Performance Experiment
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Performance Experiment: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Queue queries filter status and severity, order by opened_at, and join owner_id across 3000 modeled rows. Compare baseline and indexed plans, preserve results, and account for insert and storage cost.

Evidence target: Record what required effort · Review Performance Experiment.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Record what required effort · Review Performance Experiment, keep Performance Experiment connected to executable relational evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Benchmark representative warmed and cold cases, verify unchanged results, and account for write amplification.
